ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2012-13, 2013-14) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the season is the current one */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., All Teams, TOR, GOS) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (e.g., Las Vegas) */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team (e.g., TOR, GOS) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Las Vegas) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the game was played */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_game_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Position in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_seasons" (
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player season record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Points per game scored by the player in the season */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Rebounds per game made by the player in the season */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Assists per game made by the player in the season */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Steals per game made by the player in the season */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Blocks per game made by the player in the season */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Turnovers per game committed by the player in the season */,
  "minutes_per_game" REAL /* Average minutes played per game by the player */,
  "field_goals_per_game" REAL /* Average field goals made per game by the player */,
  "three_pointers_per_game" REAL /* Average three-pointers made per game by the player */,
  "free_throws_per_game" REAL /* Average free throws made per game by the player */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the player */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_seasons" (
  "team_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team season record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team in the season */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Points per game scored by the team in the season */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Rebounds per game made by the team in the season */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Assists per game made by the team in the season */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Steals per game made by the team in the season */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Blocks per game made by the team in the season */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Turnovers per game committed by the team in the season */,
  "minutes_per_game" REAL /* Average minutes played per game by the team */,
  "field_goals_per_game" REAL /* Average field goals made per game by the team */,
  "three_pointers_per_game" REAL /* Average three-pointers made per game by the team */,
  "free_throws_per_game" REAL /* Average free throws made per game by the team */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the team */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage of the team */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., points per game, rebounds per game) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic is for */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic is for */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date the statistic was recorded */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of the statistic (e.g., game, season) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., points per game, rebounds per game) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic is for */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic is for */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date the statistic was recorded */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of the statistic (e.g., game, season) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, view report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
